headline: DaVita Inc. Schedules 1st Quarter 2026 Investor Conference Call
summary: DaVita Inc. (NYSE: DVA), announced today that it will hold its quarterly conference call to discuss first quarter results on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The company plans to release its results after market close the same day.
